## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:
- Risk level: low / medium / high

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests were run for impacted areas
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior or operations changed
- [ ] Rollback approach documented for risky changes

## Contribution and Licensing

- [ ] I confirm I have the right to submit this contribution
- [ ] I agree this contribution may be used and relicensed under HDIM's project licensing model (source-available BSL 1.1 + commercial licensing)

## Security and Compliance

- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added
- [ ] Any security implications are documented
- [ ] For vulnerabilities, I used the private reporting process in `SECURITY.md`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and avoids unrelated changes
- [ ] CI is green (or exceptions explained)
- [ ] Linked issue(s) or rationale provided
